inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Defines id (or many ids) of the element (or elements) that label the component.

inputs.name: columnSpan
inputs.description:
Defines column span of the component,
e.g how many columns the group should span to.

inputs.name: headerLevel
inputs.description:
Defines the compoennt heading level,
set by the `headerText`.

inputs.name: headerText
inputs.description: Defines header text of the component.
